message.content: YES. The main heading is "Filières & Classes" with a subtitle "Référentiels : filières, classes, matières et affectations (F6.2)". The content shows filière cards: "BTS SIO" (with green book icon, description, 2 classes, 4 matières, + Classe/+ Matière buttons) and "BTS MCO" (similar structure), plus a partial "Licence Informatique" card below. Each card includes student counts, class lists (with student numbers), matière lists (with coefficients), and action buttons.
